name: LOST IN TIME – VR 360 Sci-Fi Short Film

reviews.review_description: This is a very enjoyable VR experience. I like the idea of travelling through time, it’s very much like a roller coaster ride, but great fun to watch. My only two concerns were that the graphics seemed a bit blurry. Maybe a HD quality option would help. Also perhaps include a bar option so that players can scroll forward or backwards to their favourite scenes. Other than that it was good for the money. Happy to change my rating to five stars if you can address these issues.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and suggestions. We’re glad you enjoyed the experience and appreciate your feedback on visual clarity and navigation. We’re considering adding a higher-resolution version and scene selection options in future updates.

reviews.review_description: I loved the way the story is told, so unique, and it had me hooked from start to finish. I’m a huge fan of time travel stories, and this one is beautifully crafted, with VR that completely immerses you in the experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 🙏 We’re thrilled you enjoyed the story and the way VR brings it to life. Time travel has always fascinated us, so it means a lot to hear it resonated with you this way.

reviews.review_description: I liked the experience but it didn’t have that VR wow factor, it was a bit flat. The message is however greatly delivered and I shed a tear at the end! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your experience. We truly appreciate your feedback, it means a lot to hear that the story touched you. We're continuously working to bring even more immersion and that “VR wow factor” into our future projects.

reviews.review_title: Not really what I was expecting.....
reviews.review_description: Cool concept but for me was a bit preachy with its climate change alarmism. Visuals were ok but nothing special although having a full 360 degree view is always kinda fun. Overall probably not something id watch again or use to show off VR capabilities as IMO theres better content available but hey it cost me about the same as a cup of coffee so im glad to have seen it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving it a try and sharing your honest feedback. We know the environmental theme may not be for everyone, but it’s part of the story we wanted to tell. Glad you still found some value in the 360° experience, and we really appreciate your support!
